---
layout: default
title: "Political Tensions Rise Over Parliamentary Privilege and Electoral Integrity"
date: 2026-07-01T11:35:53.377828+00:00
summary: "Congress challenges Rajnath Singh in Parliament, while concerns over voter deletions and judicial interventions in state policies dominate the national disco..."
run_time_ist: "5:05PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 5:05PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Privilege motion against Defence Minister:</strong> The Congress party has moved a privilege motion against Rajnath Singh, alleging he misled the Lok Sabha regarding soldier casualties during Operation Sindoor.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Electoral integrity concerns:</strong> The Congress has labeled the BJP’s electoral mandate as &quot;stolen,&quot; citing the alleged deletion of 27 lakh voters, while the CPI has joined the INDIA bloc in urging the ECI to ensure free and fair elections.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I27</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Tamil Nadu challenges cow slaughter ban:</strong> The Tamil Nadu government has approached the Supreme Court to contest the Madras High Court’s blanket ban on cow slaughter, arguing the court overstepped its constitutional authority.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxOYnpTZW9QUXRJVWRpeURvWndIT3picXpQcDFsZGgzbjBaNFNXZHJrNkFVdVRBbm9hYnczVnh2eE11VlF6MFJ6SlRQamplMm9TNjVqYm1aeTNsZHpBdUNzVFZnRTdnY1VmRHFiOVZITnFEX0xCeUU0eENZWUN4T0FlMUJOdjBVbU1xZmxkTVVPTjI5QzUzQ0xwWTJnRDgtN2pVdXlleERYRXZ3WlkyRzQ1WTA1X3pROUZNc1FmaHJkTjZnQU5fa29pRkRJYw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxOajRsWjZ0UG5IcGk4VGs2UFdUWW5PNHV1MVh4WTQtT0hUSUk4cHBfNXVCZ2VaZ0Y3eDdDalBWM1hwMWZXTWxaMXpUSFhTcHRrZFljcGNOMXFQdUxfRXFNS1M5bjBoWno3SjNvMHpnSkE5aTdTd1ZYQnd6cldEMklocFd5QXVBYnhpaV9WaF9EVzJJZFl5RUdhU2V6SXVTNl83Z2xOb1ktUmF2RmNNcnBkQVNLWFcyY3Vna2J4MHVTak9xUk9ndlYtaw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Supreme Court intervenes in ethanol allocation:</strong> The Supreme Court has stayed the Karnataka High Court’s order regarding BPCL ethanol allocation and clarified that the Centre did not characterize the E20 blending program as a mere &quot;experiment.&quot;</li>
  <li><strong>Legislative and governance updates:</strong> Prime Minister Modi marked 11 years of the Digital India initiative, while Home Minister Amit Shah addressed Parliament on efforts to combat Left-Wing Extremism and introduced key legislative bills, including the 131st Constitutional Amendment.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxNYVhfUEdXc0tPdWtMelRQSEhUWm40eGdlTTBCQ0pjWlhBSzVLd1hqT0VCdDBDS21DbjFyWldBd3MwdHZubDcyLUQ0c0tGcHRqMUJHTERILWVnbGd0MjRlVllfWVZ2c1B2Q1hDaDBldWMxVmV6MEdSUk5vVmJ0bGk2aE1pRzNLYS1JelpNR0lSSzZlTV91d25aQlZEWnRZMWtvQXE3VjJXVU9EOUFZNnBWTjdR?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W11] BJP rule in Bengal won&#x27;t be different, will be equally aggressive: KC Venugopal - India Today</a> India Today</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W13] The Congressional Black Caucus and Haitian Bridge Alliance to Host a National Tps Town Hall on Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 6:30pm Est, Following Scotus Decision – the Bridge - Haitian Bridge Alliance</a> Haitian Bridge Alliance</li>
</ul>

</details>
</article>
